# plane_label (Resource)

A label within a Plane project.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String)
- `project_id` (String)
- `workspace_slug` (String)

### Optional

- `color` (String) Hex color string for the label. Assigned by Plane when omitted.
- `parent` (String) UUID of a parent label (for sub-labels).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `project` (String)
- `workspace` (String)
